creator: stas@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sun, 29 Apr 2007 15:00:05 -0500 (CDT)
 Sean Farley <sean-freebsd@farley.org> mentioned:
 
 > This removes the DBUS check for ecore.  Since ecore does not appear to
 > link against any other DBUS port, it is not necessary.  In addition,
 > enlightenment-devel will not build if ecore does not have DBUS enabled
 > due to a dependency on Ecore_DBus.h in e.h.  A better way is welcome.
 >
   This options is intended for users wanting to use ecore in their own
 projects, and which doesn't need dbus support. E.g. xmms-ecore.
 Currently there's no way to build ecore plugin separately, so we'll
 better live with this.
 
 > Fixed the URL in pkg-descr.
 >
 
 I'll commit it.
 
 --
 Stanislav Sedov
 ST4096-RIPE
